Class StudentVisa

java.lang.Object
classes.Application
classes.StudentVisa
public class StudentVisa extends Application
Student Visa application class, sub class of application.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Hassan Abdus Salam

  • Constructor Details

    • StudentVisa

      public StudentVisa(int appNO, Applicant applicant, Status status, LocalDate submissionDate, Officer officer, String universityName, int studyDurationYears, boolean scholarship)
      Constructs a StudentVisa application
      Parameters:
      applicant - the applicant
      status - the current status
      submissionDate - the submission date
      officer - the assigned officer
      universityName - the name of the university
      studyDurationYears - the study duration in years
      scholarship - true if the applicant has a scholarship
      appNo - the application number
